findings.summary: Detached worktree execution required a manual sibling symlink for the local `biomedical-mcp` dependency before `uv run` commands would resolve correctly.
findings.evidence: In the harness-deferred worktree I had to create `/Users/alien/Projects/genomics/.worktrees/biomedical-mcp -> /Users/alien/Projects/biomedical-mcp` before running checks in `/Users/alien/Projects/genomics/.worktrees/harness-deferred-2026-04-01`. The symlink was cleanup-only session scaffolding, not project state.
findings.proposed_fix: Add a `scripts/bootstrap_worktree.sh` helper that creates required sibling symlinks for worktree-local path dependencies, or change the dependency declaration so worktrees do not need manual symlink repair.

findings.summary: I initially treated the failing BA1/BS1 tests as stale expectation drift, but a second focused run exposed a real LR classifier bug: ClinVar pathogenic evidence could still be auto-overruled into a benign label.
findings.evidence: First failing run: `uv run pytest tests/test_triage_contracts.py tests/test_core_logic.py tests/test_output_consumers.py -q` only showed BA1/BS1 expectation failures. Later run: `uv run pytest tests/test_core_logic.py tests/test_invariants.py -q` also failed `TestClinVarGuards.test_pathogenic_not_bp4_dismissed`, reproducing the real bug fixed in commit `3949167 [curation] Guard ClinVar conflicts — stop auto-benign overrides`.
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: when classification tests look stale, rerun the adjacent invariant suite before declaring them test churn. Add a small `just classify-smoke` target that runs `tests/test_core_logic.py` plus `tests/test_invariants.py` together.

findings.summary: The deferred harness plan was not re-grounded against recent commits early enough. I entered detached-worktree execution with an outdated mental model of D2, then had to narrow it after reading the recent commit history.
findings.evidence: `git log --oneline -8 -- scripts/variant_evidence_core.py scripts/modal_rare_variant_triage.py scripts/annotate_triage.py scripts/generate_review_packets.py scripts/modal_utils.py scripts/wgs_config.py` showed `390c71f [harness] Derive modal_utils path constants from wgs_config.Paths — single source of truth`, which meant D2 was no longer broad path-unification debt but a narrower `Sample` delegation cleanup.
findings.proposed_fix: Move the existing `git log --grep before re-auditing dispatch findings` rule into the first explicit step of `project-upgrade --harness` / deferred execution checklists so old audit plans are re-grounded before worktree setup or patch design.
